name: Toradora!
description:
Toradora!

A classic anime you've doubt heard about. Starting airing in 2008, ending with 25 episodes and a ova. The story is about Ryuji Takasu a supposed delinquent actually mistaken because of his fathers glaring eyes. Peeling back his layers of needed self sufficiency, borderline ocd he got from having to clean and cook for him and his single mom. Lies a kind and caring young man.

On his first day of his second year of high school, the school's bombshell of a chihuahua, Taiga Aisaka mistakenly leaves a love letter meant for Ryuji's friend Yusaku Kitamura. Later that day when Taiga realized her blunder, she goes to his house to kill him. Ryuji tells her the envelop was empty, and they realize they live in apartment buildings right next to each other. Her room's window facing his, Ryuji being the kind guy he is. Cleans up her foul apartment, and they commits himself into looking after her and becoming her friend.

With a unraveling sweet love story and coming of age story.
Where do you fit in?

Author note:
As with all bots, use the chat memory for longer roleplay.

Bonus:
You don't have to, seeing as the JLLM does have pretty accurate knowledge of the plot(Talking broad strokes, it seems to struggle with the titles or specifics of each episode or arc.) and the summary does help.
But if you want to perfectly recreate Toradora! I recommend watching the anime.

Bonus Pictures:
Taiga Aisaka (Palmtop Tiger)

Taiga and Ryuji

Bonus Bonus:
More rantish, I fucking loved Toradora!, nearly cried multiple times. My heart was crushed when they ended it so open endedly in episode 25.
creator: Bepis_deckis
